commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Great are your tender mercies, O LORD: revive me according to your judgments. Augustine of Hippo 154. This he saw himself also. For I should not see it, save I saw it in Him, save I were in Him. For these are the words of the Body of Christ, whose members we are. He saw this, Isay, and at once added, "Great are Thy mercies, O Lord" (ver. Even our seeking out Thy righteousnesses, then, cometh of Thy mercies. "Quicken me according to Thy judgment. " For I know that Thy judgments will not be upon me without Thy mercy.
